A total of 1 Assistant Project Engineer vacancy has been announced through the IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Bachelor's degree in engineering (Computer Science, Electronics, IT) or MCA.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Salary 2026
IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 is Assistant Project Engineer.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Project Engineer post at IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The last date to apply is 17 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 20 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a Bachelor's degree in engineering (Computer Science, Electronics, IT) or MCA.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 34880 Per Month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the location of the IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: IIT Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.
